My order has not arrived yet. Can you check shipping?

contextDelta.policy_excerpt:
# FAQ

- Shipping lookup: after shipment, customers can track package status by order id.
- Return window: items can be returned within 7 days after delivery.
- Refund timeline: approved refunds are returned in 1-3 business days.
- Manual review: conflicting order data or risky requests require human support.
